verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My Jesus, my Savior, Lord, there is none like You; All of my days I want to praise The wonders of Your mighty love.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My comfort, my shelter, Tower of refuge and strength; Let every breath, all that I am Never cease to worship You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Shout to the Lord, all the earth, Let us sing Power and majesty, praise to the King; Mountains bow down and the seas will roar At the sound of Your name.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I sing for joy at the work of Your hands, Forever I'll love You, forever I'll stand, Nothing compares to the promise I have in You.
